info.title: Satellite Intelligence Segmentation API
info.description: AI-powered satellite image segmentation and intelligence analysis using SAM 2.1 on H100 GPUs. Upload a satellite/aerial image (via URL or base64) and receive: auto-segmented regions, Claude Vision-classified intelligence categories (military vehicles, infrastructure, runways, terrain disturbances, etc.), confidence scores, and an annotated image with numbered overlays and a detailed intelligence report panel.

post.summary: Analyze a satellite or aerial image for intelligence segmentation
post.description: Accepts a satellite/aerial image via URL or base64. Runs SAM 2.1 auto-segmentation on H100 GPU, filters segments by area, sends numbered overview to Claude Vision for military intelligence classification, and returns: (1) annotated image with colored overlays and numbered markers, (2) per-segment analysis with category, confidence, and description, (3) processing stats. Categories include: military_vehicle, military_installation, aircraft, vessel, vehicle, building, infrastructure, road, runway, terrain_disturbance, earthwork, water, vegetation, cleared_area, shadow, unknown.

image_url.description: URL of the satellite/aerial image to analyze. Provide either image_url or image_base64.

image_base64.description: Base64-encoded image data (with or without data:image/... prefix). Provide either image_url or image_base64.

points_per_side.description: SAM 2.1 grid density for auto-segmentation. Higher = more segments but slower. Default: 64

pred_iou_thresh.description: Minimum predicted IoU threshold for segments. Default: 0.82

stability_score_thresh.description: Minimum stability score for segments. Default: 0.90

min_area_pct.description: Minimum segment area as percentage of total image. Default: 0.1

max_area_pct.description: Maximum segment area as percentage of total image. Default: 60.0

max_segments.description: Maximum number of segments to analyze. Default: 40

200.description: Analysis complete — returns annotated image and per-segment intelligence

annotated_image_base64.description: Base64-encoded JPEG of the annotated satellite image with colored segment overlays, numbered markers, and an intelligence report side panel

analyses.description: Per-segment intelligence classification from Claude Vision

id.description: Segment number (matches the numbered marker on the annotated image)

category.description: Intelligence category: military_vehicle, military_installation, aircraft, vessel, vehicle, building, infrastructure, road, runway, terrain_disturbance, earthwork, water, vegetation, cleared_area, shadow, unknown

confidence.description: Classification confidence: high, medium, or low

description.description: Concise 5-15 word intelligence description of the segment

ai_analysis_time_s.description: Claude Vision analysis time in seconds

400.description: Invalid request — missing image or bad parameters

500.description: GPU backend error or analysis failure

get.summary: Check service and GPU backend health
get.description: Returns health status of both the proxy service and the H100 GPU backend running SAM 2.1.
